title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is devastated as Yama Dev arrives to take his mother's soul. In desperation, he implores Lord Shiva to save her life. How will Lord Shiva respond in this critical moment?

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: A delivery boy, who is burdened with family responsibilities, gets into a contract marriage with Jhansi, a rich woman who despises men.

title: ABHIMANYU
subTitle: Arjun seeks to change the education system by putting his life at risk to nationalise private schools in the country. Will he succeed in his efforts?

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: The whole village gathers as Devappa is brought to the procession for the Jatra. Hurt by Balu boycotting the Jatra rituals, Devappa orders that Balu is brought in front of him. What will happen when Balu refuses to bow down to Devappa's glory?

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Balu wants to leave the Jatra celebrations and go home as he thinks that Satyava's life is in danger. But he is stopped by his father, who is worried about the threat of Devappa. What will Balu do now?
